problem_statement: The same revision and serialized replay input passed yesterday and fails today. Available evidence does not fingerprint dependencies, runtime state, clock, or data snapshots. Decide whether a root-cause patch is justified.

observations.statement: Yesterday's run used revision r20 and input hash f88 and produced pass; no environment fingerprint was recorded.
Today's run used revision r20 and input hash f88 and produced fail; no environment fingerprint was recorded.
A source diff confirms no tracked implementation change between the runs, but there is no isolated experiment for any non-code dimension.
